stemHtml: An aircraft is approaching Bern airport for a visual approach. Having contacted the Tower, the pilots receive the following reply: "F-SN, JOIN RIGHT HAND DOWNWIND RUNWAY 05 HEIGHT 1000 FEET QFE 1002". The correct response is…

options.a: "F-SN, JOINING RIGHT HAND DOWNWIND RUNWAY 05 HEIGHT 1000 FEET QFE 1002, F-SN"
options.b: "JOINING RIGHT HAND DOWNWIND RUNWAY 05 ALTITUDE 1000 FEET QFE 1002, F-SN"
options.c: "JOINING RIGHT HAND DOWNWIND RUNWAY 05 HEIGHT 1000 FEET QFE 1002, F-SN"
